title: Add LICHEN peer enumeration for Meshtastic node DB sync
description: Why this exists: project-LICHEN-t2hn.6 can emit the local self node_info, but Meshtastic want_config_id stage 69421 should include known peers once LICHEN has a peer/status table. What needs to be done: expose a bounded peer enumeration/status snapshot API with EUI/IID, name if known, last-heard, SNR/RSSI, hop distance, and optional metrics; wire Meshtastic node DB sync to emit one NodeInfo per peer. Acceptance criteria: enumeration is bounded and concurrency-safe; node-number collisions are deterministic and tracked; native_sim tests cover self-only and multi-peer output.
